MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Dec-21-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Eric Firstman of Meyers, Nave, Riback, Silver & Wilson telephone number 510-808-2000 for Plaintiff Matthew Schoenberg.
John Heisse of Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman LLP telephone number 415-983-1543 for Defendants 38 Degrees North Latitude Builders, Inc. and Paul Blickman.

The matter was argued. Upon conclusion of argument, DEFENDANTS 38 DEGREES NORTH LATITUDE BUILDERS, INC.AND PAUL BLICKMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is taken under submission.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)

MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Sep-07-2016 Continued To Oct-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Eric Firstman of Meyers Nave Riback Silver & Wilson (510-808-2000) appears as counsel for plaintiff/opposing party

Attorneys, William S. Hale and John R. Heisse of Pillsbury Winthrop Shaw Pittman LLP (415-983-1329) appear as counsels for defendants/moving parties

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. Court directs counsel to meet and confer off record. The matter is recalled.

DEFENDANTS 38 DEGREES NORTH LATITUDE BUILDERS, INC. AND PAUL BLICKMAN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION is CONTINUED to October 25, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Court grants counsel leave to file supplemental moving papers no later than October 7, 2016 and supplemantal opposition no later than October 14, 2016. There shall be no reply and no further papers for this motion.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Sherry L. Sawyer, CSR #59761, email: ssawyer@sftc.org. (D302)
